title: Bude
tagline: From industrial supplier to ecosystem of comfort and innovation
description: A comprehensive brand identity redesign transforming Thermoindustria into BUDE — a modern home comfort company built around four natural elements: fire, water, air, and earth. New name, new mark, new language system across Georgian and Latin scripts.
role: Brand Strategy, Visual Identity, Environmental Design

blocks.heading: The Brief
blocks.body:
Thermoindustria needed a complete transformation — from a regional HVAC supplier to a recognisable consumer brand capable of competing in the modern home comfort market.

The brief called for a new name, a new identity, and a flexible design system that could work across two writing systems and speak to two very different audiences: technical professionals who specify products, and families who buy them.

image.alt: Bude brand icon — stylised window with flowers and cat, orange on dark background
image.caption: The nest — home as a place of warmth, life, and comfort

image.alt: Bude branded showroom interior — element grid on wall, orange accent lighting, logo signage
image.caption: Showroom, Tbilisi — environmental design

blocks.heading: BUDE (ბუდე)
blocks.body:
The name means "nest" in Georgian — a universal metaphor for home in its most intimate sense. A four-letter word with no negative connotations in any major language, easy to pronounce, and deeply rooted in local culture.

The "+" suffix represents the brand's core promise: nature's four elements, plus human engineering. Fire, Water, Air, and Earth map directly onto the product range — heating, plumbing, ventilation, insulation.

image.alt: Bude logo system sheet — multiple lockups across colours and both Latin and Georgian scripts
image.caption: Logo system — Latin and Georgian lockups in primary, reversed, and app icon formats

blocks.heading: Type System
blocks.body:
Two typefaces carry the identity in parallel. Neue Frutiger World handles Latin-script communication — a humanist grotesque with warmth and precision, selected for its extensive language support.

For Georgian, ALK Life provides the Mkhedruli companion — matched in optical weight and spacing rhythm so that neither script feels subordinate. Both typefaces were treated as equals from the first layout.

images.alt: Neue Frutiger World typeface specimen — Latin character set displayed on orange organic shape
images.caption: Neue Frutiger World — Latin

images.alt: ALK Life typeface specimen — Georgian Mkhedruli character set on orange organic shape
images.caption: ALK Life — Georgian

blocks.heading: Symbol Language
blocks.body:
Four element glyphs — fire, water, air, earth — form the atomic unit of the visual system. Arranged in a 2×2 grid with the "+" crosshair, they produce the primary logomark.

Deployed at scale, the symbols become a living pattern: a generative field of marks that fills surfaces, packaging, and environmental graphics. Dense or sparse, coloured or monochrome, the system adapts to any context without losing recognition.

image.alt: Bude element symbols scattered across cream background with organic amber and orange blob shapes
image.caption: Symbol field — element marks in organic composition

image.alt: Dense grid of Bude element symbols across the full brand palette with golden connecting lines
image.caption: Extended palette — element symbols across all brand colours

blocks.heading: Mr. Serious & Mr. Fun
blocks.body:
BUDE speaks in two voices. Mr. Serious is factual and expert — confident with architects, engineers, and specifiers. Mr. Fun is warm and witty — approachable with homeowners and families.

The same identity flexes between both registers without contradiction. The grid and the organic blob. The monochrome and the full colour. Serious and fun are not opposites — they are two moods of the same nest.

image.alt: Mr. Serious and Mr. Fun brand personality spread — two character faces with attribute lists on amber background
image.caption: Brand personality — Mr. Serious and Mr. Fun

image.alt: Abstract BUDE character face built from element symbols — 'In its presence Bude swings from Mr. Serious to Mr. Fun'
image.caption: Character illustration — element symbols composing a human face

image.alt: Bude retail store exterior — dark facade with Georgian script BUDE+ sign above entrance, element grid in window
image.caption: Retail store — Georgian-script signage and window graphics

image.alt: Bude branded stationery spread — housewarming gift card with grid pattern, orange blob graphic, handwritten note
image.caption: Stationery — branded gift card and collateral

title: Gra v Dovgy
tagline: 101 вхід до теми бізнесу. Завжди розраховуй на себе
description: Complete brand identity for a Ukrainian business education platform built on one principle — always count on yourself. A pixel-native visual system using an ant as its symbol of relentless, collective effort. The identity spans digital, print, and merchandise with Electric Green as its defining accent.
role: Brand Strategy, Visual Identity, Typography System

image.alt: Gra v Dovgy — main logo spread, pixel ant symbol and wordmark on white and dark backgrounds
image.caption: Фірмовий знак — pixel logotype and ant symbol

blocks.heading: The Brief
blocks.body:
Gra v Dovgy — "Play for the Long Game" — is a Ukrainian business education platform with one founding principle: always count on yourself. The brand needed to feel built from scratch, not borrowed from a trend.

The brief was direct: a visual identity for 2026 that reads as native to digital, works across all surfaces, and carries the energy of independent thinking without corporate polish.

image.alt: Gra v Dovgy adaptive logo variants — light and dark background versions across eight formats
image.caption: Адаптивні варіанти фірмового знаку — light and dark applications

blocks.heading: The Ant
blocks.body:
The brand symbol is an ant — drawn on a pixel grid, precise and undecorated. The ant builds relentlessly, carries more than its weight, and operates as part of a larger system while remaining fully autonomous.

This is the exact model the platform teaches: individual discipline, long-term compounding, no shortcuts. The pixel construction method echoes the platform's digital-first nature and the idea of building something one block at a time.

image.alt: Gra v Dovgy colour palette — Pastel Black, White Smoke, Electric Green, Midnight Silver and five additional colours
image.caption: Colour system — 4 primary + 5 additional

image.alt: Gra v Dovgy digital applications — favicon in browser tab, Instagram avatar, and pattern module diagrams
image.caption: Застосування символу на фавіконі та аватарі — digital applications

blocks.heading: Type System
blocks.body:
The primary typeface is Sevenet 7 Cyr — a pixel bitmap display font with full Cyrillic support. It makes the Ukrainian language native to the digital grid, not an afterthought. Headlines and large type are always set in Sevenet 7.

Overpass Mono handles body text across all weights — Light through Bold. Its monospaced character gives the brand a structured, code-adjacent voice. Two additional display fonts, Tiny5 and Digital Pixel, extend the pixel language for specific executions.

image.alt: Gra v Dovgy typography — Sevenet 7 Cyr and Overpass Mono on Electric Green, Tiny5 and Digital Pixel on dark
image.caption: Основні та додаткові шрифти — type system

blocks.heading: Pattern System
blocks.body:
The brand pattern is a regular grid of squares — a direct translation of the pixel construction method into surface design. Squares can be read as pixels, as cells in a grid, as individual units in a collective structure.

The system scales through four configurations: 1×1, 1×2, 1×3, and 3×3. Density varies from full field to sparse scatter. On Electric Green ground, the dark squares create a textile-like quality — structured and bold, readable at any scale from favicon to billboard.

image.alt: Gra v Dovgy brand pattern — full-spread Electric Green field with dark pixel squares dissolving across the surface
image.caption: Фірмовий патерн — регулярна решітка з квадратів

image.alt: Gra v Dovgy branded pen — pixel pattern and wordmark on Meteor Shower purple background with Electric Green clip
image.caption: Branded merchandise — pen with pixel logotype
